lint.command: bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh
lint.observation: All four docs/governance validators passed: knowledgebase-lint OK, enterprise-policy OK, architecture-check OK, orchestrator-layer OK

typecheck.observation: Maven compile succeeded with exit code 0

test.command: N/A - docs-only milestone, no runtime tests needed
test.observation: Docs-only milestone, test suite not required for validation

blockingIssues.description: exports-and-approvals.md: GET /api/v1/exports/status/{requestId} does not exist in OpenAPI spec. Approval paths POST /api/v1/admin/approvals/{approvalId}/approve do not exist (actual paths are type-specific like PUT /api/v1/admin/exports/{requestId}/approve). ExportRequestCreateRequest schema documented with exportType/format/idempotencyKey fields but actual schema only has reportType and parameters.
idempotency-and-errors.md: POST /api/v1/accounting/journal is actually POST /api/v1/accounting/journals/manual. POST /api/v1/invoices does not exist in OpenAPI spec.

accounting-reference-chains.md: GET /api/v1/admin/audit/events and GET /api/v1/superadmin/audit/platform-events do not exist in OpenAPI spec. Actual audit paths are /api/v1/accounting/audit-trail, /api/v1/accounting/audit/digest, /api/v1/accounting/audit/transactions.
dto-examples.md: POST /api/v1/invoices endpoint documented in DTO examples does not exist in OpenAPI spec. Invoice endpoints are GET-only.

nonBlockingIssues.description: docs/INDEX.md still lists old frontend-handoff-*.md files as canonical with no mention of new docs/frontend-portals/ tree, creating silent duplication between two frontend handoff models.

auth-and-company-scope.md says /api/v1/auth/profile is retired but the endpoint still exists in OpenAPI spec. The retirement intent is correct but explanation should acknowledge the endpoint still exists.
pagination-and-filters.md documents filter syntax (filter.field.in=value1,value2) that has no evidence in OpenAPI spec. Should be qualified as proposed convention.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that docs-worker must verify all documented API endpoint paths and request/response schemas against openapi.json before writing them as canonical mainline behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature docs-mainline-shared-api-and-auth-scope documented 6+ endpoint paths that do not exist in the OpenAPI spec across exports-and-approvals.md, idempotency-and-errors.md, accounting-reference-chains.md, and dto-examples.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that when creating new canonical docs that supersede earlier models, the worker should also update docs/INDEX.md and cross-links to prevent silent duplication between old and new models.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features docs-mainline-frontend-portals-foundation and docs-mainline-shared-api-and-auth-scope both created new canonical docs structures without updating docs/INDEX.md. The old frontend-handoff-*.md files still appear as the canonical handoff model.
